response: To remove an interviewer, go to Interviews > Templates, click More options next to the template, select Share, choose the user to remove, and click Remove User, then Confirm.
justification: [Source: 2837093779-standardizing-interviews-using-templates.md] describes the steps to remove access for any user or team from an interview template. The passage outlines a 5-step process to remove a user: go to Interviews > Templates, click the More options menu next to the template and select Share, select the user or team to remove, select Remove User from the drop-down menu, and click Confirm in the confirmation dialog box.

response: Hello, according to Visa's FAQ, in the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of $10 for credit cards. This is an exception to the general rule that merchants are not permitted to establish minimum or maximum amounts for Visa transactions.
